title: October 7
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|October}}

'''October 7''' is the 280th day of the year (281st in leap years). There are 85 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1950s#1950|1950]] – [[Howard Chaykin]] is born.
*[[1960s#1968|1968]] – [[Steve Behling]] is born.
*[[1972]] – [[Sean Kenin Elias-Reyes]] is born.
*[[1998]] – ''[[Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand 3]]'' published.
*[[2005]] – [[Charles Rocket]] dies.
*[[2009]] – [[Invasion 4|''Invasion'' 4]] published.
*[[2010]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Defenders of the Republic]]'' published.
*[[2011]] – "[[Mercy Mission (episode)|Mercy Mission]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2013]] – ''[[Viva Space Vegas! The History of the Marvelous Wheel]] Part 2'' published online.
*[[2014]] – ''[[The Adventures of Luke Skywalker, Jedi Knight]]'' published.
*[[2015]] – [[Darth Vader (2015) 10|''Darth Vader'' (2015) 10]] published.
*2015 – [[Lando 5|''Lando'' 5]] published.
*2015 – [[Shattered Empire 2|''Shattered Empire'' 2]] published.
*2015 – [[Star Wars (2015) 10|''Star Wars'' (2015) 10]] published.
*2015 – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 10|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 10]] published in the United Kingdom.
*[[2018]] – "[[The Recruit]]" premieres on [[Disney Channel]].
*[[2019]] – [[Andor Season 1|''Andor'' Season 1]] began filming.
*[[2020]] – [[Star Wars (2020) 7|''Star Wars'' (2020) 7]] published.
*2020 – [[Star Wars Adventures (2020) 1|''Star Wars Adventures'' (2020) 1]] published.
*[[2025]] – ''[[Star Wars: Legacy of Vader – The Reign of Kylo Ren Vol. 1]]'' published.
*2025 – ''[[Star Wars: The Blueprints: Designs and Artwork from the Skywalker Saga]]'' published.
<noinclude>
